rationale: Ukraine's continued territorial recapture and intensified strikes on Russian logistics are directly relevant to every Ukrainian's daily life — this is a continuation of last cycle's positive qualitative shift, sustaining the elevated baseline.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: Ukrainian forces continue to reclaim territory and have doubled strikes on Russian supply lines. This directly affects the war's trajectory and daily security for Ukrainian residents — a continuation of the positive shift from last cycle.

top_events.title: Iran-US deal stalemate; US attention partially diverted
top_events.summary: The ongoing Iran nuclear negotiations continue to occupy US diplomatic bandwidth. No concrete change to Western military aid for Ukraine, but the distraction factor persists.

top_events.title: France-Germany FCAS collapse: European defense autonomy weakened
top_events.summary: The collapse of the Franco-German fighter jet program signals continued European defense fragmentation, which indirectly affects Ukraine's long-term prospects for EU-backed security guarantees.
